task_completion.description: Add the Lottie dependency to the app's build.gradle file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the app-level build.gradle file open in the editor, containing a line like `implementation 'com.airbnb.android:lottie:6.3.0'` (or a newer version) in the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: Copy the android_wave.json animation file into the project's resources or assets folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the project file explorer (e.g., in Android Studio). The file `android_wave.json` should be visible inside `app/src/main/res/raw/` or `app/src/main/assets/`.

task_completion.description: Replace the static TextView with a LottieAnimationView in the main layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main activity layout file (e.g., activity_main.xml) open in the editor. The `<TextView>` tag should be removed and replaced with `<com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView>`.

task_completion.description: Configure the LottieAnimationView to use the android_wave.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the `<com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView>` tag in the XML editor. It must contain an attribute linking the animation file, such as `app:lottie_rawRes="@raw/android_wave"` or `app:lottie_fileName="android_wave.json"`.

task_completion.description: Configure the animation to play automatically and loop indefinitely.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the `<com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView>` tag in the XML editor. It must contain the attributes `app:lottie_autoPlay="true"` and `app:lottie_loop="true"`.

integrity.description: The agent used an IDE or text editor to modify the project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Android Studio or another code editor being used to edit build.gradle and XML files, rather than just terminal commands echoing text.

integrity.description: The asset was genuinely copied into the project structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout XML should reference the file via standard Android resource/asset paths (e.g., @raw/android_wave), NOT using an absolute path to the original /home/ga/Documents/assets/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the animation using a static image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout XML must explicitly use the com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView tag, not an ImageView displaying a static screenshot of the wave character.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/BasicApp. The original asset is at /home/ga/Documents/assets/android_wave.json. The required dependency is 'com.airbnb.android:lottie' (version 6.3.0 or newer). The expected XML tag is 'com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView'. The animation depicts an 'AndroidWave' character.
